purpose: Track migration from code-SSOT legacy files to wiki-SSOT slices.

statuses.observed: The running app and legacy code were observed; wiki candidates and evidence exist.
statuses.specified: Visible and hidden behavior are specified in wiki, but the spec is not frozen.
statuses.spec-frozen: The wiki is frozen as the only implementation input for this slice.
statuses.blind-implemented: A wiki-only implementation exists without legacy-code access.
statuses.parity-reviewed: The wiki-derived implementation passed parity review against legacy evidence.
statuses.wiki-ssot: The wiki is the proven SSOT for this slice.
statuses.adapter: A thin compatibility layer connects legacy entrypoints to wiki-derived implementation.
statuses.retired: The legacy file or branch is no longer used.
